nodes.label: Google-inspired section accent color system
nodes.rationale: Each portfolio section uses a distinct Google brand color (red, blue, yellow, green) in both light and dark variants, driven by IntersectionObserver scroll events dispatching to Redux accentSlice. Chosen because Google's palette is widely recognized, vibrant, and provides clear visual differentiation between sections.

nodes.label: GitHub Pages deployment strategy
nodes.rationale: All data is public-facing; no secrets to hide. GitHub Pages with gh-pages branch deployment adds zero complexity and no serverless overhead compared to Vercel.

nodes.label: JSON files as data source instead of CMS
nodes.rationale: Solo developer workflow — editing JSON and pushing takes 30 seconds. A CMS adds complexity without benefit at this scale.
